17.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

17.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
17.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
17.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

17.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
17.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

18.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
18.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

18.gl: to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative)
18.kj: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inhe

18.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
18.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

18.gl: properly, to be smooth, i.e. (by implication) to escape (as if by slipperiness); causatively, to release or rescue; specifically, to bring forth young, emit sparks
18.kj: deliver (self), escape, lay, leap out, let alone, let go, preserve, save, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] surely.

18.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
18.kj: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
18.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

18.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
18.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.
